skill1.kitLine: Activates when Prediction status ends. Affects self. Removes 100% of ammo.
skill1.note: Deferred R2. No engine effect can empty a magazine; instantReload only ADDS. Also no Prediction-end trigger exists. Would force ~9-11 extra ~201f reloads/fight in comps (small COLD correction).

Measured 2026-07-15 (grave solo.MP4, n=19 clean reloads, 2.85-3.52s, 201f effective). reloadFramesNeeded(193,0)=round(193*0.975)+13=201f. Attribution to 'v50%' is inferred (observationally identical to datamined reloadFrames simply wrong); operative value is measured. Solo 1.277→1.005.

skill1.kitLine: Removes Heat Emission under certain conditions.
skill1.note: Condition unspecified in kit text. Cannot model without knowing the trigger.

skill1.kitLine: Activates only when in Heat Emission status. Affects self. Recovers 2% of the skill user's final Max HP every 1 sec continuously.
skill1.note: Heal only, no damage. SELF-target: recovery fires on grave who has no on-recovery trigger, so cannot feed a teammate (hard-rule-2 reviewed). No periodic trigger kind exists to encode it. Genuinely inert cross-unit.

skill1.kitLine: Activates only when in Heat Emission status. Affects all allies. Burst Gauge filling speed ▲ 38.96% continuously.
skill1.note: Modeled as always-on passive. Real uptime excludes ~10s Prediction windows (Heat Emission is OFF during Prediction). Slight HOT overcount during those windows.

skill1.kitLine: Activates only when in Heat Emission status. Affects all allies. Pierce Damage ▲ 48.4% continuously.
skill1.where: skill1[1]: passive → allies excludeSelf, buff pierceDamagePct 48.4
skill1.note: excludeSelf: grave-self can never benefit (she has pierce only in Prediction, when Heat Emission is OFF). Prevents burst-window double-count with burst pierceDamagePct 52.8. Allies still receive it (inert unless pierce-tagged). Same always-on passive approximation as burstGenPct.

skill2.kitLine: Activates after landing 15 normal attacks. Affects self. Overheat I: ATK ▲ 15.48%.
skill2.note: Approximated as sustained (no durationSec). Ignores the per-reload reset (see next line).

skill2.kitLine: Removed upon reloading to max ammunition.
skill2.note: Absorbed by the sustained hitCount-15 approximation (hand decision). Real Overheat I drops on every reload and must re-stack 15 hits; sim treats it as permanent after first proc.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when landing a normal attack after Prediction takes effect. 30 attacks landed: While in Prediction and Overheat I status, Overheat II: ATK ▲ 20.66% continuously.
skill2.where: skill2[1]: burstCast → self, buff atkPct 20.66 durationSec 10
skill2.note: burstCast proxies the Prediction trigger. 30-hit build-up approximated as full 10s window uptime (real ramp-in ~2.5s at 12 rounds/s). Slight HOT overcount early in window.

skill2.kitLine: 60 attacks landed: While in Prediction and Overheat II status, Overheat III: Attack Damage ▲ 30.8% continuously.
skill2.where: skill2[1]: burstCast → self, buff attackDamagePct 30.8 durationSec 10
skill2.note: Same burstCast proxy. 60-hit build-up approximated as full 10s window uptime (real ramp-in ~5s at 12 rounds/s). Slight HOT overcount early in window. Co-located in the same block as Overheat II.

burst.kitLine: Prediction: Current HP ▼ 1% every 1 sec, lasts for 10 sec.
burst.note: HP drain self-cost. Defensive — no damage impact in the sim's partless-boss scope-lock model.

MODELED FAITHFULLY (2026-07-17). Engine gainPierce + pierceUntilFrame window. Enables Pierce Damage ▲ Damage-Up to land during Prediction. Moves comps 0.83→1.18 HOT ON PURPOSE (real mechanic > fit). Residual HOT is a separate burst-window over-model tracked in U19. Solo unaffected (lone B2 never bursts).

burst.where: burst[0]: burstCast → self, buff pierceDamagePct 52.8 durationSec 10
burst.note: Literal kit text. Self-only. Stacks with team 39.98 = +92.78 total Damage Up during Prediction. S1's 48.4 is excludeSelf'd so no double-count.

burst.where: burst[0]: burstCast → self, buff critRatePct 85.19 durationSec 10

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Attack Damage ▲ 48.2% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1]: burstCast → allies, buff attackDamagePct 48.2 durationSec 10
burst[1]: burstCast → allies, buff pierceDamagePct 39.98 durationSec 10
burst.note: Literal kit text. Applies to all allies (including grave via the allies target — she is pierce-tagged during Prediction so it lands).

burst.kitLine: Max Ammunition Capacity ▲ 3 round(s) for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1]: burstCast → allies, buff maxAmmoPct 3 durationSec 10
burst.note: Schema is percent-only; flat 3 rounds encoded as maxAmmoPct 3. Inexpressible per-target as flat rounds. Negligible practical effect.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: Heat Emission team buffs (burstGenPct 38.96%, pierceDamagePct 48.4%) modeled as always-on passive — real uptime excludes the ~10s Prediction windows after her burst.
documentedConfounds.why: Overcounts team buff uptime by ~10s per burst cycle. Small per-cycle but accumulates over a 180s fight.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: Prediction-end 'Removes 100% of ammo' not modeled — one forced ~3.35s reload per burst cycle in comps.
documentedConfounds.why: Missing forced reloads means sim fires more shots than reality in comps. ~9-11 forced reloads/fight. Small COLD correction that would reduce her comp damage.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Overheat II/III 30/60-hit build-up approximated as full 10s burst-window uptime (real ramp-in ~2.5s/~5s at 12 rounds/s).
documentedConfounds.why: Overcounts ATK and Attack Damage uptime early in the Prediction window. durationSec 7.5/5.0 would match real in-window uptime. Identified as a candidate for the U19 residual fix.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: 'Gain Pierce' (10s) MODELED FAITHFULLY — moves comps 0.83→1.18 HOT ON PURPOSE. Residual HOT is a SEPARATE burst-window over-model tracked in U19.
documentedConfounds.why: Deliberate faithful modeling of a real mechanic. The resulting HOT is the dominant board gap (1.179 ratio). The pierce itself is correct; the residual over-model is in Overheat II/III full-window uptime and possibly the unmodeled Prediction-end forced reload.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: team 'Max Ammunition Capacity ▲ 3 round(s)' encoded as maxAmmoPct 3 — schema is percent-only, flat rounds inexpressible.
documentedConfounds.why: 3 rounds on a 60-round magazine is ~5% — negligible damage impact. Encoding imprecision is cosmetic.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: Heat Emission self-heal 2% Max HP/1s — heal only, no damage, genuinely inert cross-unit.
documentedConfounds.why: No damage effect. Grave has no on-recovery trigger so cannot feed teammates. Correctly dropped.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: 'Removes Heat Emission under certain conditions' — condition unspecified in kit text.
documentedConfounds.why: Cannot model without knowing the trigger. Likely a niche conditional (e.g., specific boss mechanic). No evidence of damage impact in scope-lock.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Overheat I 'Removed upon reloading to max ammunition' — absorbed by sustained hitCount-15 approximation.
documentedConfounds.why: Overheat I is a small ATK buff (15.48%). The sustained approximation slightly overcounts but the per-reload reset and re-stack roughly balance over a 180s fight. Hand decision, documented.

documentedConfounds.text: charFixes.reloadFrames=193: attribution to 'Heat Emission v50%' is inferred, not isolated. She only ever reloads in Heat Emission, so 'v50%+overhead' and 'datamined reloadFrames simply wrong' are observationally identical.
documentedConfounds.why: The operative value (201f effective reload) is MEASURED (n=19, tight 2.85-3.52s). The narrative attribution is uncertain but the number is not. Solo validated at 1.005.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Grave's whole-kit Overheat/Prediction cycle: S1 Heat Emission team buffs (burstGenPct, pierceDamagePct) as always-on passives with excludeSelf on pierce to prevent burst-window double-count; S2 Overheat I as a sustained hitCount-15 ATK buff, Overheat II/III as burstCast-tied 10s buffs approximating the 30/60-hit ramp as full-window uptime; burst slot faithfully parsed from kit text (unlimited ammo, gainPierce, self crit+pierce, team ATK+pierce+maxAmmo). The reload was measured (n=19) and encoded via charFixes.reloadFrames=193, fixing solo from 1.277 to 1.005. The dominant known gap is the deliberate pierce modeling (faithful > fit) which moved comps from ~0.83 COLD to ~1.18 HOT; the residual HOT is a separate burst-window over-model (Overheat II/III full-window uptime + missing Prediction-end forced reload) tracked in open-questions U19.
